TraderNPCPositions.name: Viktor
TraderNPCPositions.greeting: Hello There. I have work for those brave enough.
greetings: Hello There. I have work for those brave enough.
Back again? Good. I have more tasks for you.
You look capable. I might have something for you.
Glad you found me. Things are getting rough out there.

TraderNPCPositions.name: The Collector
TraderNPCPositions.greeting: Hello stranger. Got some tasks if you're interested.
greetings: Hello stranger. Got some tasks if you're interested.
Ah, a visitor. I always need things collected.
You have the look of someone who can handle themselves.
Perfect timing. I was just thinking I needed help.

TraderNPCPositions.name: Sister Emma
TraderNPCPositions.greeting: Bless you stranger. Can you help me?
greetings: Bless you stranger. Can you help me?
God sent you at the right time. I need assistance.
Welcome traveller. These are dark times but there is always hope.
Peace be with you. I have tasks if you are willing.

TraderNPCPositions.name: Fisher
TraderNPCPositions.greeting: G'day Mate. I need a few things handled. Are you looking for work?
greetings: G'day Mate. I need a few things handled. Are you looking for work?
Crikey, you look like someone who gets things done!
Good to see another survivor. Got some jobs if you're up for it.
Ah, just the person I needed.

Quests.title: Scavenger
Quests.description: The camp is running low on medical supplies. Please help us.
Quests.acceptMessage: Bring me 4 Bandages and 12 Tetracycline.

Quests.title: Long Hunt
Quests.description: We need food. Hunt some deer for the camp.
Quests.acceptMessage: Hunt 2 deer.

Quests.title: Wolves
Quests.description: Wolves have been attacking our scouts. Thin out the herd.
Quests.acceptMessage: Kill 3 wolves.

Quests.title: Eradicate
Quests.description: The wolf population has grown dangerously large. Eliminate 20 wolves to make the roads safer for survivors.
Quests.acceptMessage: Wolves hunt in packs - stay sharp.

Quests.title: Arms Cache
Quests.description: I collect rare weapons. I need a SVD for my collection.
Quests.acceptMessage: Find me an SVD!

Quests.title: Delivery
Quests.description: I have a package that needs to reach The Collector at Altar Radio Tower.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this package to The Collector at Altar Radio Tower.

Quests.title: Last Rites
Quests.description: Sister Emma needs a Bible to perform last rites. Take this to her at the church in Kabanino
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this Bible to Sister Emma in Kabanino church.

Quests.title: Delivery 3
Quests.description: I Finally got Fisher's new Rod ready. Can you deliver it to Fisher at Black Lake?
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this Fishing Rod to Fisher at Black Lake.

Quests.title: Lost Hooks
Quests.description: I have lost my Fishing Hooks. Bring me 4 Fishing Hooks and 2 Netting so I can fish for the camp.
Quests.acceptMessage: Bring me 4 Fishing Hooks and 1 Netting.

Quests.title: Supply Run
Quests.description: The Novo survivors are running low on food. Scavenge what you can from the surrounding area.
Quests.acceptMessage: Bring me 5 Tuna Cans and 3 bags of Rice. The camp needs feeding.

Quests.title: Armed Escort
Quests.description: One of our runners was attacked on the road. We need someone to thin out the infected around the main road into Novo.
Quests.acceptMessage: Clear the infected from the roads. Our people need to move safely.

Quests.title: The Lost Package
Quests.description: A supply runner dropped a Walkie somewhere near Novo. I need someone to recover it and bring it back.
Quests.acceptMessage: Find the walkie talkie and batteries. We need to stay in contact with the other camps.

Quests.title: Medicine Run
Quests.description: Viktor needs medical supplies delivered to Sister Emma at Kabanino church. She is treating wounded survivors.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this Epinephrine to Sister Emma quickly. Lives depend on it.

Quests.title: Boar Hunt
Quests.description: The camp needs meat for the winter. Hunt some boar to help feed the Novo survivors.
Quests.acceptMessage: Hunt 3 boars. The survivors need meat on the table.

Quests.title: Gods Medicine
Quests.description: Sister Emma is treating sick survivors but is running dangerously low on antibiotics and bandages.
Quests.acceptMessage: God bless you. Bring me those supplies - people are suffering.

Quests.title: The Missing
Quests.description: A young survivor went missing hiking in the woods. Sister Emma fears the worst. Search the nearby area and find out what happened.
Quests.acceptMessage: I fear wolves took him. Clear the pack so no one else suffers this fate.

Quests.title: Holy Water
Quests.description: Sister Emma needs clean water to perform baptisms and tend to the wounded. Bring her water bottles.
Quests.acceptMessage: Bless you. Clean water is the foundation of healing.

Quests.title: Light in the Dark
Quests.description: Sister Emma wants to light the church as a beacon of hope for survivors. She needs Small Gas Canisters and a Portable Gas Lamp.
Quests.acceptMessage: A light in the darkness gives people hope. Please find what I need.

Quests.title: Deer for the Poor
Quests.description: Sister Emma feeds survivors who come to her church. She needs meat to keep them going.
Quests.acceptMessage: Hunt 4 deer. The hungry come to us and we must not turn them away.

Quests.title: Bait Run
Quests.description: Fisher needs worms to bait his traps. Not glamorous work but essential for feeding the camps.
Quests.acceptMessage: No bait, no fish. Simple as that mate.

Quests.title: Bear Trouble
Quests.description: A bear has been raiding Fisher's camp and destroying his equipment. It needs to be dealt with.
Quests.acceptMessage: Big bloke keeps smashing my gear. Sort him out would ya?

Quests.title: Net Repair
Quests.description: Fisher's nets are torn beyond repair. He needs materials to make new ones.
Quests.acceptMessage: Without nets I can't feed anyone. Get me what I need.

Quests.title: Fuel Delivery
Quests.description: Fisher needs fuel delivered to Viktor at Novo to power the camp generator.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get that fuel to Viktor in Novo. The camp needs power.

Quests.title: Clearing the Shore
Quests.description: Infected have been gathering along Fisher's fishing spots making it impossible to work safely.
Quests.acceptMessage: Can't fish with those bloody infected about. Clear em out!

Quests.title: Rare Find
Quests.description: The Collector has heard rumours of a Winchester rifle somewhere in Chernarus. He will pay handsomely for it.
Quests.acceptMessage: A Winchester in good condition. Do not damage it.

Quests.title: Pistol Collection
Quests.description: The Collector wants to expand his sidearm collection. Bring him a variety of pistols.
Quests.acceptMessage: Two fine sidearms. Bring them to me undamaged.

Quests.title: Optics Wanted
Quests.description: The Collector prizes fine optics almost as much as the guns themselves. Bring him what you can find.
Quests.acceptMessage: Fine glass is hard to come by. Bring them to me carefully.

Quests.title: Suppressor Hunt
Quests.description: The Collector wants suppressors for his collection. A quiet gun is a sophisticated gun.
Quests.acceptMessage: Silence is golden. Find me those suppressors.

Quests.title: Ammo Stockpile
Quests.description: The Collector needs ammunition stockpiled for the camp's defense. Scavenge as much as you can.
Quests.acceptMessage: We can never have too much ammunition. Get me what you can find.

Quests.title: Word from The Collector
Quests.description: The Collector has a sealed letter for Viktor up north. She doesn't say what's in it, but she's offering good coin to see it delivered.
Quests.rewardMessage: About time. I was starting to wonder.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this to Viktor. Don't read it.

Quests.title: Medicines for Emma
Quests.description: The Collector has sourced some medical supplies she can't use herself. She wants them taken to Sister Emma - a rare act of generosity, or so she says.
Quests.rewardMessage: Bless you, and bless whoever sent these.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these to Sister Emma. She needs them more than I do.

Quests.title: Tackle for the Fisher
Quests.description: The Collector has a crate of fishing hooks she acquired in a trade. No use to her. Fisher might want them.
Quests.rewardMessage: Finally, someone useful. Good on ya.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get these hooks to Fisher down at the coast.

Quests.title: Message for Viktor
Quests.description: Sister Emma has word of injured survivors near Viktor's camp. She needs this message delivered so he can send help.
Quests.rewardMessage: I'll send someone. You've done good work.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to Viktor. People are counting on it.

Quests.title: A Gift for The Collector
Quests.description: Emma found an old book she thinks The Collector would value. She'd rather it go to someone who appreciates it than rot here.
Quests.rewardMessage: How interesting. Emma always surprises me.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to The Collector at the radio tower.

Quests.title: Food for the Coast
Quests.description: Emma has canned food she can't store much longer. Fisher's camp on the coast could use it. A long walk, but the right thing to do.
Quests.rewardMessage: Emma sent food? She's a good woman. Here, take this.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this food to Fisher before it spoils.

Quests.title: Message for Viktor
Quests.description: Fisher has spotted military activity along the coast road. Viktor needs to know. Take this report north.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good intel. I'll put it to use.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this report to Viktor. The faster the better.

Quests.title: Salvage for The Collector
Quests.description: Fisher pulled up something unusual in his nets - looks valuable. The Collector's the one to know what it is.
Quests.rewardMessage: Fascinating. Tell Fisher I owe him one.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this salvage to The Collector. She'll know its worth.

Quests.title: Supplies for Emma
Quests.description: Fisher set aside some medical supplies from a wrecked boat. He's no use for them himself. Emma's camp needs them more.
Quests.rewardMessage: God bless him. These will save lives.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these supplies to Sister Emma in Kabanino.

Quests.title: Intel for The Collector
Quests.description: Viktor has gathered intelligence on survivor movements near the radio tower. The Collector trades in information - she'll pay well for this.
Quests.rewardMessage: Exactly what I needed. Viktor's sources are reliable as ever.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this to The Collector. Don't let anyone else read it.

Quests.title: Aid for Sister Emma
Quests.description: Viktor intercepted a supply drop meant for Emma's camp. She needs these bandages. Get them to her.
Quests.rewardMessage: Viktor came through. Tell him I said thank you.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these bandages to Sister Emma.

Quests.title: Rope for Fisher
Quests.description: Viktor has surplus rope from a cache he found. Fisher mentioned needing it for his nets. Make it happen.
Quests.rewardMessage: Rope! Finally. Tell Viktor he's alright by me.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this rope down to Fisher at the coast.

Quests.title: Field Medic
Quests.description: Viktor's fighters are burning through med supplies faster than he can stock them. He needs a resupply before the next patrol.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good. The men can move again.
Quests.acceptMessage: Morphine and epinephrine. Don't come back without both.

Quests.title: Radio Check
Quests.description: Two of Viktor's long range radios have gone dead. He needs fresh batteries and a replacement handset.
Quests.rewardMessage: Finally we can reach the eastern scouts again.
Quests.acceptMessage: Four batteries and two radios. Go.

Quests.title: Winter Cache
Quests.description: Viktor is stockpiling for a hard winter. He needs non-perishables and cooking equipment secured now.
Quests.rewardMessage: That'll keep us fed through the cold.
Quests.acceptMessage: Tins, more tins, and a pot. The camp needs feeding.

Quests.title: Fuel Reserve
Quests.description: Viktor's camp generator is running low. Without fuel the lights go out and so does morale.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good. Keep the lights on a little longer.
Quests.acceptMessage: Two full jerry cans. Don't bring me empties.

Quests.title: Tool Run
Quests.description: Viktor needs basic tools to keep the camp maintained. A hacksaw and some duct tape will do for now.
Quests.rewardMessage: These'll last us a while. Cheers.
Quests.acceptMessage: A hacksaw and duct tape. Nothing fancy.

Quests.title: Clear the Road
Quests.description: Infected have overrun the highway into Novo. Viktor's supply convoys can't get through. Clear a path.
Quests.rewardMessage: Road's clear. For now.
Quests.acceptMessage: Twenty-five infected. The highway must stay open.

Quests.title: Deer Season
Quests.description: The camp is hungry and Viktor isn't above asking for help putting meat on the table.
Quests.rewardMessage: That'll feed people for a few days at least.
Quests.acceptMessage: Three deer. The camp eats tonight.

Quests.title: Wolf Pack
Quests.description: A large wolf pack has moved in near the northern road. Viktor needs them cleared before they start taking people.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good hunting. The road north is safer now.
Quests.acceptMessage: Eight wolves. Don't let them scatter.

Quests.title: Boar Cull
Quests.description: Boar are destroying the camp's vegetable plots. Viktor wants them gone before there's nothing left to harvest.
Quests.rewardMessage: The gardens might just survive winter now.
Quests.acceptMessage: Five boars. Don't leave any of them standing.

Quests.title: Parts for Fisher
Quests.description: Viktor salvaged a boat engine part Fisher has been asking about for weeks. Time to get it to him.
Quests.rewardMessage: Bloody beauty! I've been waiting on that for months.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get that spark plug to Fisher. He'll know what it's for.

Quests.title: Medicine Pledge
Quests.description: Viktor promised Sister Emma medical grade supplies when they became available. They're available now.
Quests.rewardMessage: Tell Viktor I'll remember this kindness.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get the epinephrine to Emma. I gave her my word.

Quests.title: Map Drop
Quests.description: Viktor has drawn up a detailed map of infected hotspots near Altar. The Collector will pay for that kind of intelligence.
Quests.rewardMessage: Viktor's intel is always worth the price.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get that map to the Collector. Don't lose it.

Quests.title: Morale Package
Quests.description: Viktor has put together a care package of luxuries for Fisher's hard-working crew. Weed, coffee, the small things that matter.
Quests.rewardMessage: Haha! Viktor's a legend. The crew'll love this.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to Fisher's camp. His people have earned it.

Quests.title: Scripture Run
Quests.description: Viktor found a bible in a ransacked church. He's not a religious man but he knows Emma would want it.
Quests.rewardMessage: Bless Viktor. He has more faith than he admits.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this bible to Emma. She'll put it to good use.

Quests.title: Data Cache
Quests.description: Viktor recovered a military flash drive from a dead soldier. The Collector deals in this kind of thing.
Quests.rewardMessage: Interesting. Very interesting. Good work.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this to the Collector. She'll know its value.

Quests.title: Night Vision
Quests.description: The Collector has a buyer for military night optics. She needs them sourced quietly and quickly.
Quests.rewardMessage: Perfect condition. Exactly what I needed.
Quests.acceptMessage: A PNV-10T. Don't damage the optics.

Quests.title: Blade Collection
Quests.description: The Collector has recently developed an interest in edged weapons. Bring her a selection.
Quests.rewardMessage: A fine collection. Thank you.
Quests.acceptMessage: Three blades. Condition matters.

Quests.title: Surplus Ammo
Quests.description: The Collector needs to restock her trading inventory. Common calibres — the kind everyone always needs.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good. These will move fast.
Quests.acceptMessage: Two calibres, as much as you can find.

Quests.title: Field Rations
Quests.description: The Collector needs provisions for a long stay at the tower. Nothing fancy — just enough to keep going.
Quests.rewardMessage: That'll keep me going for another week.
Quests.acceptMessage: Food and and more Food. The usual.

Quests.title: Map Collection
Quests.description: The Collector prizes local maps. She uses them to track survivor movements and supply routes.
Quests.rewardMessage: Navigation tools. Always useful.
Quests.acceptMessage: A map and a compass. Don't fold the map badly.

Quests.title: Tower Defence
Quests.description: Infected have been clustering around the base of the radio tower making resupply runs dangerous. Clear them out.

objectives.description: Kill 20 Infected near the radio tower

Quests.rewardMessage: Good. I can hear myself think again.
Quests.acceptMessage: Twenty infected. The approach to the tower must be clear.

Quests.title: Pest Control
Quests.description: Wolves have been circling the radio tower at night. The Collector doesn't sleep well with howling outside.
Quests.rewardMessage: Quiet at last. Good work.
Quests.acceptMessage: Four wolves. Keep them away from my tower.

Quests.title: Trophy Hunt
Quests.description: The Collector wants a bear pelt for her collection. She won't say why. She never says why.
Quests.rewardMessage: Excellent. Don't ask what I need it for.
Quests.acceptMessage: One bear. Try not to ruin the pelt.

Quests.title: Trade Goods for Viktor
Quests.description: The Collector has surplus weapons parts Viktor can use. She's willing to trade — for a favour later.
Quests.rewardMessage: Tell her the debt is noted.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these cleaning kits to Viktor. He'll owe me one.

Quests.title: Rare Book
Quests.description: The Collector acquired a book she thinks Emma would treasure more than herself. A rare moment of generosity.
Quests.rewardMessage: She sent me a book? I shall treasure it.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to Emma. It deserves to be read, not sit on a shelf.

Quests.title: Fishing Gear
Quests.description: The Collector traded for fishing equipment she has no use for. Fisher might as well have it.
Quests.rewardMessage: A good rod! She does alright, that Collector.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this rod to Fisher. It's no use gathering dust here.

Quests.title: Viktor's Intel
Quests.description: The Collector has compiled a dossier on survivor camp locations Viktor doesn't know about yet. Knowledge is currency.
Quests.rewardMessage: This changes everything. Tell her we're square.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this dossier to Viktor. He'll want to act fast.

Quests.title: Medical Drop
Quests.description: The Collector has sourced saline bags from a crashed ambulance. Emma's clinic needs them urgently.
Quests.rewardMessage: These will save lives tonight. Thank you.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get these saline bags to Emma. People are waiting.

Quests.title: Healing Hands
Quests.description: Emma's clinic is overwhelmed with infected wounds. She desperately needs antiseptics and suture kits.
Quests.rewardMessage: God bless you. These wounds won't heal themselves.
Quests.acceptMessage: Disinfectant and sewing kits. Every one matters.

Quests.title: Survival Cache
Quests.description: Emma is putting together emergency survival caches around the settlement. She needs the basics - rope, a knife, something to start a fire, and a way to purify water.
Quests.rewardMessage: This will keep people alive out there. Good work.
Quests.acceptMessage: Rope, knives, lighters, purification tablets. The basics. Don't come back without them.

Quests.title: Safe Passage
Quests.description: Emma needs rope and wire to rig warning systems around the church perimeter to protect the sick and elderly inside.
Quests.rewardMessage: Now they will hear anything that comes in the night.
Quests.acceptMessage: Rope and barbed wire. The church must be safe.

Quests.title: Cooking for Many
Quests.description: Emma feeds anyone who comes to the church. She needs cooking supplies to keep the kitchen running.
Quests.rewardMessage: Many mouths fed tonight because of you.
Quests.acceptMessage: Rice and a pot. Simple needs, great importance.

Quests.title: Pain Relief
Quests.description: Emma's patients are suffering without proper pain medication. Any morphine or epinephrine found must reach them.
Quests.rewardMessage: You have eased much suffering today.
Quests.acceptMessage: Morphine and epinephrine. People are in pain.

Quests.title: Protect the Flock
Quests.description: Infected have been drawn to the church by the sounds of survivors. Emma needs them cleared before someone gets hurt.
Quests.rewardMessage: They can rest safely again. Thank you.
Quests.acceptMessage: Clear those infected from around the church. My people are frightened.

Quests.title: The Pack Returns
Quests.description: The wolf pack that took a survivor has been spotted again nearby. Emma won't rest until they're dealt with.
Quests.rewardMessage: May they rest in peace. All of them.
Quests.acceptMessage: Seven wolves. End this.

Quests.title: Mercy Kill
Quests.description: A badly wounded bear has been circling the village, dangerous and suffering. Emma asks that you end its misery.

objectives.description: Put the bear out of its misery

Quests.rewardMessage: A mercy. For the bear and for us.
Quests.acceptMessage: End its suffering. It's the compassionate thing to do.

Quests.title: Word to Fisher
Quests.description: Emma has heard Fisher's camp took losses in a bear attack. She wants to send her condolences and some supplies.
Quests.rewardMessage: Emma sent this? She's a saint, she is.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these bandages to Fisher. Tell him we're thinking of his people.

Quests.title: Candle for Viktor
Quests.description: Emma wants Viktor to know she prays for his camp. She's sending a small token — and a message she won't entrust to anyone else.
Quests.rewardMessage: Tell her I appreciate it. More than she knows.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this letter to Viktor. It's personal.

Quests.title: Offering for The Collector
Quests.description: Emma has prayed on it and decided The Collector deserves a gesture of goodwill, whatever her reputation.
Quests.rewardMessage: A bible. How unexpectedly touching.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to The Collector. Even she deserves grace.

Quests.title: Saline for the Shore
Quests.description: Fisher's crew get injured often working the water. Emma wants to send saline bags to help them manage.
Quests.rewardMessage: Emma looks out for us. Good woman.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get these saline bags to Fisher's crew on the coast.

Quests.title: Church Records
Quests.description: Emma has documented the names of every survivor who has passed through or died at the church. Viktor asked for a copy for the camp records.
Quests.rewardMessage: These names deserve to be remembered.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these records to Viktor. Every name matters.

Quests.title: Net and Line
Quests.description: Fisher needs fishing line and replacement netting. Without them half his traps are useless.
Quests.rewardMessage: Now we're back in business.
Quests.acceptMessage: Netting and hooks. Simple as that.

Quests.title: Boat Repair
Quests.description: Fisher's rowboat took damage in a storm. He needs materials to patch it up before the next fishing run.
Quests.rewardMessage: She'll float again. Good on ya.
Quests.acceptMessage: Duct tape and netting. The boat needs it more than you do.

Quests.title: Camp Supplies
Quests.description: Fisher's camp is running low on basics. Food and water for the crew working the shore.
Quests.rewardMessage: That'll keep the crew going. Cheers.
Quests.acceptMessage: Tins and water. My crew works hard and needs feeding.

Quests.title: Shore Salvage
Quests.description: Fisher spotted wreckage washed up along the coast. He needs someone to salvage what's useful before the tide takes it.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good salvage. That wreck had plenty left.
Quests.acceptMessage: Fuel and batteries from the wreck. Don't drown.

Quests.title: Storm Prep
Quests.description: A storm is coming in off the coast. Fisher needs supplies secured before it hits.
Quests.rewardMessage: We'll ride the storm out now. Cheers.
Quests.acceptMessage: Rope and duct tape. Everything needs tying down.

Quests.title: Shore Clearance
Quests.description: Infected are washing up along the beach from somewhere offshore. Fisher's crew can't work with them stumbling about.
Quests.rewardMessage: Coast is clear. For now anyway.
Quests.acceptMessage: Twenty infected. The shore belongs to us not them.

Quests.title: Wolf at the Water
Quests.description: Wolves have started hunting along the shoreline at dusk. Fisher's night crew are too exposed.
Quests.rewardMessage: The crew can work nights again. Good shot.
Quests.acceptMessage: Five wolves. The coast road at dusk is not safe right now.

Quests.title: Big Game
Quests.description: A massive boar has been raiding Fisher's food stores. It's too big and aggressive to chase off. It needs to be put down.

objectives.description: Kill the large Boar raiding the camp

Quests.rewardMessage: That boar was the size of a car. Unreal.
Quests.acceptMessage: One boar. Big one. You'll know him when you see him.

Quests.title: Viktor's Order
Quests.description: Fisher has been holding a weapons cache Viktor ordered weeks ago. Time to get it delivered.
Quests.rewardMessage: Finally. Tell Fisher the next order's on me.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this cleaning kit up to Viktor. He's been waiting long enough.

Quests.title: Emma's Medicine
Quests.description: Fisher pulled medical supplies from a sunken boat. He has no use for them but Emma's clinic does.
Quests.rewardMessage: God bless Fisher. These will go straight to the patients.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get that morphine to Emma's clinic. Don't drop it.

Quests.title: Collector's Find
Quests.description: Fisher's nets pulled up something strange — looks like pre-outbreak tech. The Collector will know what it's worth.
Quests.rewardMessage: Fascinating. Tell Fisher I'll be in touch.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take this to the Collector. She pays well for unusual finds.

Quests.title: Rope for Viktor
Quests.description: Viktor's camp needs rope to secure their supply drops and Viktor asked Fisher to source some.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good. We've been tying everything down with bootlaces.
Quests.acceptMessage: Get this rope up to Viktor's camp.

Quests.title: Parts for The Collector
Quests.description: Fisher has salvaged electronic components the Collector has been looking for. A good trade opportunity.
Quests.rewardMessage: Exactly what I needed. Fisher has good eyes.
Quests.acceptMessage: Take these parts to the Collector. She's been looking for them.

Quests.title: Survivor Count
Quests.description: Viktor needs a headcount of survivors in nearby towns. He's tracking population shifts to plan supply routes.
Quests.rewardMessage: Good intelligence. This changes our routing.
Quests.acceptMessage: Three survey notes — one per town. Note what you see.

Quests.title: Collector's Bounty
Quests.description: The Collector is offering a standing bounty on military-grade weapons. She has a particular buyer in mind.
Quests.rewardMessage: Exactly what the buyer wanted. Exceptional work.
Quests.acceptMessage: An AKM and an M4. Undamaged if possible.

Quests.title: The Long Vigil
Quests.description: Emma has kept a vigil over a dying survivor for three days. She needs supplies to continue and someone to check the perimeter.
Quests.rewardMessage: He passed peacefully. Thank you for keeping us safe.
Quests.acceptMessage: Ten infected around the church. Let him die in peace.

Quests.title: The Final Haul
Quests.description: Fisher is planning one last massive fishing run before winter. He needs everything in order — bait, gear, and a clear shore.

objectives.description: Kill 3 Wolves on the shore road

Quests.rewardMessage: Right then. Let's fish.
Quests.acceptMessage: Thirty infected and three wolves. Clear the whole coast.

Quests.title: The Grand Collection
Quests.description: The Collector's life work — assembling the finest weapons collection in Chernarus. She needs one of everything to complete it.
Quests.rewardMessage: Magnificent. The collection is complete.
Quests.acceptMessage: The four pillars of any serious collection. Do not damage them.
